name: oversize / malformed inbound frames -> dropped, dispatch continues
doc: a >MAX_FRAME_BYTES line and a non-JSON line are each dropped (the SDKs log them); the next initialize still works. (A JSON-array line is intentionally not tested — JS `typeof []` / PHP `is_array([])` mean the scripting SDKs don't classify it as a non-object frame, so the behavior isn't uniform; the per-SDK suites cover their own handling.)
manifest:
[plugin]
id = "confplugin"
version = "0.1.0"
name = "Conf"
description = "conformance fixture"
min_nexo_version = ">=0.1.0"
